title: SAKURA COUNSELING - 211info
text: NW PORTLAND SAKURA COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, couples, and family counseling specializing in BIPOC and LGBTQ+ communities, anxiety, depression, trauma, and multicultural concerns. 1942 NW Kearney Street #11 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Limited hours after 5pm and during the day on Sundays. Individual counselor hours vary. Email (971) 254-1357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 254-1357 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website more information FEES: Insurances accepted: Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid), Regence, BCBS, Moda, Kaiser, Cigna, Providence, and self-pay options are available Out of network: $130 with a sliding scale fee on a case-by-case basis Consultation: No cost, one-time 15-minute virtual consultation DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Columbia, Multnomah, Tillamook, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet buses 24, 26, 77 and the Portland Streetcar. Services: Conjoint Counseling * Cultural/Racial Issues Conjoint Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Issues Family Counseling * Cultural/Racial Issues Family Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Issues Individual Counseling * Cultural/Racial Issues Individual Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NW PORTLAND
